1.description: Fetch Trondheim municipality geometry by name

3.description: Clip high-risk quick-clay areas to Trondheim municipality

5.description: Find parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay areas

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

args.sql: SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';

SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(k.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, k.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse s ON k.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = s.klasse WHERE s.klasse = 'høy';

SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(t.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, t.teig_id AS teigid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t JOIN matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.kommunenummer k ON t.kommunenummer = k.kommunenummer WHERE k.kommunenummer = '5001';

1.description: Retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Retrieve high-risk quick-clay hazard areas filtered by Trondheim kommunenummer

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
